articles.author: Ellen Francis
articles.title: U.S. moves toward troop reductions in Europe as Hegseth scolds NATO allies - The Washington Post
articles.description: The United States will review force levels and is immediately cutting the number of assets it would activate for the continent in a crisis.
articles.content: BRUSSELS The Pentagon will conduct a six-month review of troop levels in Europe as it seeks to scale back its military footprint and shift more of the U.S. role at NATO to European allies, Defense Se… [+66 chars]
